home.description: Discover a world of creativity and interactive learning. A comprehensive platform that brings together students, supervisors, and educational institutions to achieve outstanding educational projects in science, technology, entrepreneurship, and more. MyProject Platform is the best and easiest way to manage student projects and bring STEAM education and Project-based Learning to your institution.

featuresSection.title: Platform Features
featuresSection.description: Discover a comprehensive set of tools and services designed to enhance project-based learning

projectIdeas.description: Explore a rich library of creative project ideas across various educational and technical fields

projects.description: Create and manage your educational projects easily with advanced tracking and collaboration tools

consultations.description: Get personalized consultations from specialized experts and teachers to support your projects

aiAssistant.disclaimer: The AI Assistant uses advanced artificial intelligence technologies to provide the best assistance
aiAssistant.simulatedResponse: Thank you for your question! I'm preparing a comprehensive answer for you. This is an example of how the AI assistant will provide useful and detailed information about your inquiry.

mockConversation.user1: Hello, I need help with a robotics project
mockConversation.assistant1:
Hello! I'm happy to help with your robotics project. I can assist you in several aspects:

• Robot design and component selection
• Programming and control
• Technical problem solving
• Suggesting improvements

What specific challenge are you facing?
mockConversation.user2: I want to build a waste collection robot, what components do I need?
mockConversation.assistant2:
Excellent project! Here are the essential components for a waste collection robot:

**Basic Components:**
• Control board (Arduino/Raspberry Pi)
• Motors for movement and steering
• Sensors for waste detection (camera, distance sensor)
• Robotic arm or collection mechanism
• Rechargeable battery
• Wheels or movement system

**Advanced Components:**
• GPS system for navigation
• Sensors for waste classification
• Wireless communication system

Would you like more details about any of these components?

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: At MyProject platform, we are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our platform.

projectInfo.title: Project Information
projectInfo.projects: Projects you create or participate in
projectInfo.tasks: Tasks and activities related to your projects

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.service: To provide and improve platform services
dataUsage.communication: To communicate with you about your account and projects
dataUsage.improvement: To improve and develop platform features
dataUsage.security: To protect the security and safety of the platform
dataUsage.support: To provide technical support and assistance

dataStorage.title: Data Storage
dataStorage.firebase: We use Google's Firebase services to securely store and manage data.
dataStorage.security: We implement strict security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.intro: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share your information in the following cases:
dataSharing.teachers: With teachers and supervisors of your projects
dataSharing.service: With service providers who help us operate the platform
dataSharing.legal: When required by law or to protect against misuse

studentProtection.title: Student Data Protection
studentProtection.commitment: We are committed to the highest standards of student data protection:
studentProtection.noAds: We do not display targeted ads to students
studentProtection.noSelling: We do not sell or share student data for commercial purposes
studentProtection.parentalAccess: We provide parents with access to their children's data
studentProtection.schoolControl: We give educational institutions full control over their students' data

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.deletion: Request deletion of your account and data
userRights.export: Export a copy of your data
userRights.objection: Object to processing of your data
userRights.withdraw: Withdraw your consent at any time

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve your experience:

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.firebase: Firebase for data management and authentication

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.description: We retain your data as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion, your personal information will be deleted within 30 days, with some information retained for legal and security purposes.

policyChanges.title: Policy Changes
policyChanges.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes via email or through a notice on the platform.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

termsOfUse.title: Terms of Use

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.welcome: Welcome to MyProject platform. These Terms govern your use of the platform and its services.
introduction.acceptance: By using the platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.

definitions.title: Definitions
definitions.platformDesc: MyProject platform and all its services and features
definitions.userDesc: Any person who uses the platform
definitions.servicesDesc: All services provided through the platform

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.age: You must be over 13 years old or have parental consent
eligibility.parental: Students under 18 years old need parental consent
eligibility.accurate: You must provide accurate and correct information

security.title: Account Security
security.password: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password
security.confidential: Do not share your account credentials with others
security.notify: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use
security.liability: You are responsible for all activities under your account

responsibilities.title: User Responsibilities
responsibilities.intro: By using the platform, you agree to:
responsibilities.lawful: Use the platform in a lawful and legitimate manner
responsibilities.respectful: Respect the rights of other users
responsibilities.rights: Not infringe on intellectual property rights
responsibilities.security: Not attempt to hack or disrupt the platform
responsibilities.appropriate: Post only appropriate and decent content

platform.title: Platform Content
platform.description: All platform content (design, logo, text, images) is protected by intellectual property rights and owned by us.

userContent.title: User Content
userContent.ownership: You retain ownership of the content you post on the platform.
userContent.license: By posting content, you grant us a limited license to use it within the platform and provide services.

studentWork.title: Student Work
studentWork.description: Student projects and work remain their property. The platform only provides tools to manage and display them.

contentGuidelines.title: Content Guidelines
contentGuidelines.original: Original or you have the right to post it
contentGuidelines.noViolence: Free from violence and shocking content
contentGuidelines.noPolitical: Free from political or sectarian content

privacy.title: Privacy and Data Protection
privacy.description: Your use of the platform is also subject to our Privacy Policy. Please review our

serviceAvailability.title: Service Availability
serviceAvailability.description: We strive to provide continuous and reliable service, but interruptions may occur:
serviceAvailability.discontinuation: We reserve the right to suspend or discontinue service without prior notice

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.serviceProvided: The platform and services are provided "as is" without any warranties.
liability.noWarranty: We do not guarantee that the platform will be error-free or always available.
liability.limitation: We will not be liable for any direct or indirect damages resulting from use of the platform.

indemnification.title: Indemnification
indemnification.description: You agree to indemnify and hold us harmless from any claims or lawsuits resulting from your violation of these Terms or your use of the platform.

byUser.title: By User
byUser.description: You may terminate your account at any time through account settings.

byUs.title: By Us
byUs.description: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account in case of Terms violation or misuse.

disputes.title: Dispute Resolution
disputes.governingLaw: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
disputes.resolution: In case of any dispute, we encourage you to contact us first to resolve it amicably.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.description: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes. Your continued use of the platform after changes means you accept them.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.description: For any inquiries about the Terms of Use, please contact us:

termsOfUse.acceptance: By using MyProject platform, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by these Terms of Use.
